title: Lab: Recover a Broken Animal-Support Directory
summary: Lab: Recover a Broken Animal-Support Directory uses an original animal support directory incident scenario to retrieve earlier HTML skills, add a bounded artifact layer, and verify transfer with source and browser evidence.
objectives: Retrieve html elements nesting, html attributes without step-by-step imitation.
Produce and verify a real animal support directory incident artifact or evidence report.
Preserve earlier valid requirements while diagnosing changed content and constraints.

options.text: Animal support directory incident case 1: all elements are void elements, so closing tags are optional whenever the page still appears.
Animal support directory incident case 1: parent-child relationships come from correctly nested tags; indentation should then mirror that structure.
Animal support directory incident case 1: a browser screenshot proves the source tree is correctly nested.
